text:
Created attachment 239439
handbrake-1.6.0.patch

Updating multimedia/handbrake is in progress now.
Software encoder works but QSV encoding doesn't.
It seems that oneVPL-2023.1.0 is required.

https://github.com/HandBrake/HandBrake/blob/1.6.0/contrib/libvpl/module.defs#L4

I'm trying to update multimedia/onevpl port but no results were made for now.
